message:
tests: replace test_utils::run_test with local run_async helper

Replace asupersync::test_utils::run_test with a simpler local run_async
helper function in package_manager and resources test modules.

The new helper uses RuntimeBuilder::current_thread() which provides:
- Single-threaded async execution suitable for unit tests
- No special test runtime configuration needed
- Cleaner test code without closure wrapper

Changed tests:
- package_manager: test_project_settings_override_global_package_filters,
  test_resolve_extension_sources_uses_temporary_scope,
  test_manifest_extensions_resolve_with_patterns
- resources: test_cli_extensions_load_when_no_extensions_flag_set,
  test_extension_paths_deduped_between_settings_and_cli

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
